name: browser
description: Built-in browser tools for opening and observing public web pages.
author: Serana

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Search public web pages and store the search result page as the current browser page.

max_results.description: Approximate number of search results to inspect.

tools.name: open_page
tools.description: Open a public URL and store the page as the current browser page.

max_chars.description: Maximum characters of page text to return.

tools.name: observe_page
tools.description: Observe the current browser page and return readable text.

max_chars.description: Maximum characters of page text to return.

tools.name: act_page
tools.description: Attempt a small browser action. The lightweight runtime reports unsupported actions explicitly.

action.description: Action such as click, type, press, back, forward, or reload.

value.description: Optional value for typing or key actions.

tools.name: capture_page
tools.description: Capture the current page when a full browser runtime is available.

full_page.description: Whether to capture the full page.

tools.name: look_page
tools.description: Visually inspect the current page when a full browser runtime is available.

full_page.description: Whether to inspect the full page.

tools.name: browser_downloads
tools.description: List browser downloads or prepare a selected download artifact for the user.

filename.description: Filename to send when action is send.

tools.name: create_html_preview
tools.description: Create a self-contained HTML preview artifact that the mobile app can open in an in-app WebView.

title.description: Preview title shown in the app.

html.description: Complete self-contained HTML or a runnable body fragment.

cache_key.description: Optional stable key for reusing a previously generated preview.

tools.name: close_browser
tools.description: Clear the current browser page state.
